headline: Amazon develops a warehouse robot workers can speak to
summary: Amazon unveiled Proteus, its next-gen autonomous warehouse robot. This new robot can interact using natural language instead of code. The upgrade is part of Amazon's increasing pivot towards automation.

headline: Shokz upgraded its open earbuds with better sound and a lighter design
summary: Shokz launched OpenDots 2 and OpenDots Air, new open-ear earbuds. These clip-on earbuds project sound without blocking ear canals. The upgraded models boast improved sound quality and a lighter design.

headline: Nintendo confirms it will sell a new Switch 2 with replaceable battery in the EU
summary: Nintendo plans to release Switch 2 hardware in the EU with user-replaceable batteries. This change is to comply with an upcoming EU regulation by February 2027. It ensures users can easily swap batteries, extending device lifespan.

headline: Apple is bringing age verification to Texas this week
summary: Apple will implement App Store age verification for Texas users starting June 4th. This follows a federal court allowing Texas' App Store Accountability Act to proceed. New users in Texas creating an Apple ID will face age verification.

headline: Domino's Pizza Wades Into God of War Laufey No Kratos Discourse, Sparks Spicy Replies
summary: Domino's Pizza unexpectedly joined the "God of War Laufey" debate. The discussion centers on Faye being the new protagonist instead of Kratos. Domino's comments sparked a flurry of "spicy" online replies.

headline: 007 First Light Estimated to Have Sold 2.2 Million Copies, Generating $150 Million in Revenue
summary: The game "007 First Light" achieved significant sales success. It's estimated to have sold 2.2 million units worldwide. This translates to an impressive $150 million in revenue.

headline: CD Projekt's New IP, Project Hadar, Gets Extremely Vague Tease via Job Ad
summary: CD Projekt is developing a new IP, codenamed "Project Hadar." Details remain scarce, but a job advertisement offered a vague tease. The studio is also actively working on The Witcher 4 and Cyberpunk 2.

headline: Stargate SG-1 Star Michael Shanks Rallies Fans After Amazon Axes Revival, Says 'Now Is the Time to Say Something'
summary: "Stargate SG-1" actor Michael Shanks is urging fans to take action. He's protesting Amazon's sudden cancellation of the planned franchise revival. Shanks calls on fans to speak out against the decision.

headline: Starmer accuses Musk of trying to whip up division over Henry Nowak murder
summary: Keir Starmer criticized Elon Musk for his posts regarding the Henry Nowak case. Musk's comments on X questioned the police's handling of the situation. Starmer alleges Musk is attempting to incite public division.

headline: Inquest to examine if police response contributed to Henry Nowak death
summary: A full inquest into Henry Nowak's death is scheduled for September 2027. It will investigate if police actions contributed to the fatality. The proceedings will take place in Winchester.

headline: Israel and Lebanon agree to implement ceasefire if Hezbollah stops attacks
summary: Israel and Lebanon have reached a conditional ceasefire agreement. The truce hinges on Hezbollah ceasing its attacks. The US emphasized rejection of any attempts to destabilize Lebanon's future.

headline: 'Nothing left to chance' for Bayeux Tapestry's journey to London
summary: French officials are ensuring maximum safety for the Bayeux Tapestry's move to London. The 950-year-old artwork is set to travel with extreme caution. Preparations are meticulous, aiming for a "safe as a baby" transport.
